description_long: This is a sealed, vertically-oriented snack bag labeled 'Batata Lisa', featuring a predominantly orange color scheme with yellow and white text. The front of the bag displays a playful illustration of a potato character driving a car, adding a whimsical touch to the packaging. The top and bottom edges are heat-sealed, typical of single-serve snack bags, and the sides are gusseted, allowing the bag to expand when filled. The material appears to be a glossy, flexible plastic, which is common for preserving the freshness of chips or similar snacks. The branding includes a circular logo near the top left and bold, contrasting text for product visibility. No nutritional information or additional labeling is visible on the main display side.
description: A glossy orange snack bag labeled 'Batata Lisa' with playful potato graphics and bold branding, typical of single-serve chip packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Batata Lisa' branding, potato character illustration, and circular logo on a glossy orange background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, gusseted profile of the sealed snack bag, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, but with less prominent branding and graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow, gusseted edge and the sealed structure of the bag.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo near the top left of the front face, with a yellow and white color scheme.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'Batata' and the potato character illustration indicate a plain potato flavor.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon potato character driving a car is featured on the front, serving as a playful mascot.
